articles.title: “Her brand has collapsed”: Blake Lively reportedly faces major setback as Taylor Swift distances herself ahead of wedding to Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have remained conscious of staying away from the drama around her former best friend, Blake Lively, as the popular actress dragged her into the infamous lawsuit with Justin Baldoni as it broke their friendship. While there have been rumors of Blake Lively trying to get back in touch with Taylor Swift, it seems she’s going through a tough time in her life.

articles.title: 'We were wearing garbage bags': Farah recalls KKHH BTS
articles.description: Filmmaker Farah Khan reminisced about the 'Kuch Kuch Hota Hai' shoot, recalling freezing temperatures in Scotland where the cast wore garbage bags for warmth. Meanwhile, she celebrated a proud moment as her triplets, Diva, Anya, and Czar, graduated from high school, sharing joyful family pictures with fans.

articles.title: Sydney Sweeney had never done this in New York before; Scooter Braun reveals surprise late-night adventure
articles.description: They documented the adventure on social media, featuring moments like Sweeney dancing and enjoying a burger.

articles.title: Veteran singer Suman Kalyanpur passes away at 89, leaders pay tribute
articles.description: Padma Bhushan Suman Kalyanpur, veteran singer known for her songs in Hindi and Marathi, passed away at 89. Union Minister Nitin Gadkari and Maharashtra Deputy CM Eknath Shinde mourned her loss, calling it a great loss to Indian music.

articles.title: Qutub Minar’s iconic 1600-year-old iron pillar is still completely rust-free. IITians decode the ancient science behind it’s evergreen surface
articles.description: A 1600-year-old iron pillar in New Delhi remains remarkably rust-free, baffling scientists for centuries. Researchers discovered its resilience stems from its wrought iron composition, high phosphorus content, and a unique forge welding technique. A protective layer of misawite on its surface further shields it from environmental degradation.

articles.title: What Happened to Matt Brown from Alaskan Bush People? Ex-Reality TV Star's Brother Reveals Cause of Death
articles.description: Matt Brown, a former star of the Discovery Channel's Alaskan Bush People, tragically died by suicide, as confirmed by his brother Bear Brown.

articles.title: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner get married: A complete timeline of their relationship
articles.description: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner have reportedly tied the knot in London, capping a relationship that has drawn significant public attention since early 2024.

articles.title: Virat Kohli Creates History - Equals Gayle's World Record, Emulates Bumrah; Breaks Raina, Rohit's Record
articles.description: Virat Kohli created history and equalled Chris Gayle's world while emulating a rare feat only Jasprit Bumrah has managed before. The 37-year-old won the Player of the Match (POTM) award in the IPL final.

articles.description: From delivering Rs 200-crore blockbusters to cultivating his own vegetables, Malayalam icon Mohanlal leads by example. Here is a look inside his inspiring organic farming journey.

articles.title: Taarak Mehta beats big OTT releases, stays strong even during IPL 2026 and Dhurandhar rush: Ormax Rankings
articles.description: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah, a long-running Indian sitcom, achieved a significant milestone by ranking as the second most-watched OTT property in India for the week of May 18-24, 2026. The show garnered 4.2 million viewers, surpassing major streaming releases and demonstrating its enduring relatability and family-friendly appeal nearly two decades after its debut.

articles.title: Exclusive - Parineeta Borthakur on stepping into Chandrika’s shoes in Vasudha: ‘I didn’t think the love would be like this’
articles.description: Parineeta Borthakur expresses gratitude for the overwhelming response to her portrayal of Chandrika Singh Chauhan in Vasudha. The show's rise to No. 1 is attributed to her entry, with TRPs climbing significantly. Despite initial backlash from fans of the original actor, Borthakur's nuanced performance has won over viewers, making her first replacement experience a success.

articles.title: Italy bans Kanye West and Travis Scott performances over security concerns
articles.description: Italian authorities have cancelled planned performances by Kanye West and Travis Scott at a major music festival in Reggio Emilia. Officials cited security risks, crowd management concerns and potential public order issues behind the decision.

articles.title: Cannes Debutante Sushmiita Siingh Defends Alia Bhatt: Media Didn't Ignore, It's How We Perceive Things | EXCL

articles.description: Janhvi Kapoor said the Telugu film industry respects everyone’s working hours—from actors to technicians—while Bollywood productions are often more deadline-driven.

articles.title: 29 OTT release date details out: Were and when to watch Vidhu and Preethi Asrani's Tamil comedy-drama
articles.description: Rathna Kumar's Tamil coming-of-age drama 29, starring Vidhu and Preethi Asrani, is set to make its OTT debut. Released in theatres on May 8, the film follows a 29-year-old man searching for purpose and direction in life whose outlook changes after meeting a young woman. The film received positive reviews for its relatable story, performances and Sean Roldan's music, and is now gearing up to reach a wider audience through its digital release.

articles.description: Mads Mikkelsen's acting philosophy centers on finding the light in villains and flaws in heroes, reflecting the complex nature of humanity. He believes characters are shaped by their imperfections and pasts, pushing audiences to question intentions. This approach has led to his acclaimed roles, challenging conventional portrayals of good and evil.

articles.title: 'Peddi' star Ram Charan hails Vijay’s bold move to enter politics: ‘Left your stardom and career at your peak’
articles.description: Actor Ram Charan lauded Vijay's transition from cinema to public service, congratulating him on becoming Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister. Charan expressed pride in Vijay's courageous decision to serve the people, leaving behind a successful film career. This sentiment was echoed in a congratulatory X post. Meanwhile, Charan is promoting his upcoming sports action film, 'Peddi'.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Diogenes: ‘We are more curious about the meaning of dreams than about things we see when awake’ - Ancient Greek philosopher on human curiosity and chasing real-life experiences
articles.description: Ancient Greek philosopher Diogenes' quote highlights our tendency to seek meaning in dreams over observable reality. This ancient wisdom remains relevant today, urging us to value everyday experiences and direct observation for genuine understanding. Diogenes' life and teachings advocate for simplicity, self-reliance, and authentic living, reminding us that true happiness lies within.

articles.title: Madhavan says rice is a regular part of his diet: So why are people still so scared of this staple food?
articles.description: Actor R. Madhavan's remarkable weight loss journey debunks common myths about rice. Contrary to popular belief, rice in moderation, as part of a balanced diet, doesn't inherently cause weight gain. The article highlights that white rice offers valuable energy and that its impact on blood sugar is mitigated by accompanying dishes.

articles.title: 'Blast' BO day 3: Arjun Sarja film sees massive growth
articles.description: Arjun Sarja's martial arts film 'Blast' saw a significant surge at the box office, with its third-day collections jumping 81.4% to Rs 3.90 crore. The film's total India net collection reached Rs 7.30 crore, while worldwide gross earnings crossed Rs 12.47 crore. The Tamil version led domestic performance, with Tamil Nadu being the top contributor.

articles.title: Kelly Curtis passes away at 69
articles.description: Actress Kelly Curtis, elder sister of Jamie Lee Curtis, has passed away at 69. Jamie Lee Curtis shared the news emotionally, remembering Kelly as her first friend and confidante. Kelly, daughter of Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh, had a career in film and television, appearing in 'Trading Places' and 'The Devil's Daughter'. She is survived by her husband, Scott Morfee.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from Re/Member, 'Don't count us out...'
articles.description: A memorable dialogue from Re/Member highlights the importance of perseverance, reminding us not to give up on ourselves before we've even had the chance to try.

articles.title: 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do' Day 16: Film crosses Rs 60 cr globally
articles.description: In a remarkable feat, Ayushmann Khurrana's 'Pati Patni Aur Woh Do' has amassed over Rs 60 crore in global earnings after just three weeks. The film's charm remains undeterred by fresh competition, raking in Rs 1.75 crore on day 16. With a domestic net total of Rs 44.95 crore, its international box office performance is proving to be a game-changer. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: 'Karuppu' BO day 16: Suriya registers massive weekend jump
articles.description: Suriya's fantasy action film 'Karuppu' is experiencing a significant box office surge, particularly during its third weekend. The movie saw a substantial jump in collections on its 16th day, pushing its total India net collections to an impressive Rs 176.55 crore. Overseas performance also remains strong, bringing the worldwide total closer to the Rs 300 crore mark.
